findings.message: resolveExecutionMode() implemented in executor-loop.ts (not executor.ts as in expected_output), but re-exported from executor.ts — functionally equivalent, no issue.
Logger messages are in English — acceptable since they are internal diagnostics, not operator-facing UI. Schema descriptions are correctly in Russian.
10 new tests added, all 24 pass. Coverage is comprehensive: boundary cases (3↔4 steps), manual override (both directions), auto mode, no-plan fallback.
